2605.25928.title: Thaka at KSAA-2026 Task 2: Regularized Fine-Tuning for Arabic Speech Diacritization
2605.25928.paper_summary: We describe the winning system for Task 2 of the KSAA-2026 Shared Task on Arabic Speech Dictation with Automatic Diacritization. The task requires producing fully diacritized Arabic text from speech audio and undiacritized transcripts, with only 2,327 training samples available and no external data permitted. Our system fine-tunes CATT-Whisper, a character-level multimodal model combining a pretrained CATT text encoder with a frozen Whisper speech encoder. The key to our approach is training regularization: R-Drop consistency regularization, Optuna-optimized hyperparameters with high weight decay, and Focal Loss. At inference, we average 200 stochastic forward passes across four model checkpoints using Monte Carlo Dropout at the softmax probability level. The system achieves 23.26% WER on the primary leaderboard metric (with case endings, including no-diacritic positions), placing 1st among all participants.
2605.25928.paper_summary_zh: 我們描述了 KSAA-2026 阿拉伯語語音聽寫與自動標記共享任務第 2 任務的獲勝系統。<lb/>該任務要求從語音音頻和未標記的抄本中生成完全標記的阿拉伯語文本，僅有 2,327 個訓練樣本可用，且不允許使用外部數據。<lb/>我們的系統微調了 CATT-Whisper，這是一種字符級的多模態模型，結合了預訓練的 CATT 文本編碼器和凍結的 Whisper 語音編碼器。<lb/>我們方法的關鍵是訓練正則化：R-Drop 一致性正則化、Optuna 優化的高權重衰減超參數和 Focal Loss。<lb/>在推理時，我們在四個模型檢查點上使用蒙特卡羅 Dropout 在 softmax 概率水平平均 200 次隨機前向傳遞。<lb/>該系統在主要排行榜指標上達到 23.26% 的字錯率（包括詞尾，包含無標記位置），在所有參賽者中名列第一。
2605.25928.author: Meshal Alamr et.al.
2605.25928.authors: Meshal Alamr, Hassan Alqaeri, Abdullah Aldahlawi
